hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | tr " " "\n" | grep -E "\.(tsx|ts)$" | grep -v "\.d\.ts$" | head -1); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [ -f "$FILE" ]; then echo "→ tsc check: $FILE"; npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep -E "error TS" | head -5; fi'

bash -c 'CHANGED=$(git -C "d:/0.PROJECTS/02-SABO-ECOSYSTEM/sabo-mt-website" diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.(tsx|ts|css|json)$" | head -5); if [ -n "$CHANGED" ]; then echo "⚠️  REMINDER: bạn đã edit files — cập nhật DEVLOG.md (Session N+1, prepend) trước khi kết thúc session."; echo "Files changed: $CHANGED"; fi'
